fields.name: targetInterval
fields.notes: Ticks between attempt at finding a target.

fields.name: newTargetInterval
fields.notes: Target interval for when this turret already has a valid target. -1 = targetInterval

fields.name: maxAmmo
fields.notes: Maximum ammo units stored.

fields.name: ammoPerShot
fields.notes: Ammo units used per shot.

fields.name: consumeAmmoOnce
fields.notes: If true, ammo is only consumed once per shot regardless of bullet count.

fields.name: heatRequirement
fields.notes: Minimum input heat required to fire.

fields.name: maxHeatEfficiency
fields.notes: Maximum efficiency possible, if this turret uses heat.

fields.name: inaccuracy
fields.notes: Bullet angle randomness in degrees.

fields.name: velocityRnd
fields.notes: Fraction of bullet velocity that is random.

fields.name: scaleLifetimeOffset
fields.notes: Fraction of lifetime that is added to bullets with lifeScale.

fields.name: shootCone
fields.notes: Maximum angle difference in degrees at which turret will still try to shoot.

fields.name: shootX
fields.notes: Turret shoot point.

fields.name: shootY
fields.notes: Turret shoot point.

fields.name: xRand
fields.notes: Random spread on the X axis.

fields.name: drawMinRange
fields.notes: If true, a range ring is also drawn for minRange.

fields.name: trackingRange
fields.notes: Range at which it finds and locks on to the target, but does not shoot.

fields.name: minRange
fields.notes: Minimum bullet range. Used for artillery only.

fields.name: minWarmup
fields.notes: Minimum warmup needed to fire.

fields.name: accurateDelay
fields.notes: If true, this turret will accurately target moving targets with respect to shoot.firstShotDelay.

fields.name: moveWhileCharging
fields.notes: If false, this turret can't move while charging.

fields.name: reloadWhileCharging
fields.notes: If false, this turret can't reload while charging

fields.name: warmupMaintainTime
fields.notes: How long warmup is maintained even if this turret isn't shooting.

fields.name: shoot
fields.notes: pattern used for bullets

fields.name: targetAir
fields.notes: If true, this block targets air units.

fields.name: targetGround
fields.notes: If true, this block targets ground units and structures.

fields.name: targetBlocks
fields.notes: If true, this block targets blocks.

fields.name: targetHealing
fields.notes: If true, this block targets friend blocks, to heal them.

fields.name: playerControllable
fields.notes: If true, this turret can be controlled by players.

fields.name: displayAmmoMultiplier
fields.notes: If true, this block will display ammo multipliers in its stats (irrelevant for certain types of turrets).

fields.name: targetUnderBlocks
fields.notes: If false, 'under' blocks like conveyors are not targeted.

fields.name: alwaysShooting
fields.notes: If true, the turret will always shoot when it has ammo, regardless of targets in range or any control.

fields.name: predictTarget
fields.notes: Whether this turret predicts unit movement.

fields.name: unitSort
fields.notes: Function for choosing which unit to target.

fields.name: unitFilter
fields.notes: Filter for types of units to attack.

fields.name: buildingFilter
fields.notes: Filter for types of buildings to attack.

fields.name: heatColor
fields.notes: Color of heat region drawn on top (if found)

fields.name: shootEffect
fields.notes: Optional override for all shoot effects.

fields.name: smokeEffect
fields.notes: Optional override for all smoke effects.

fields.name: ammoUseEffect
fields.notes: Effect created when ammo is used. Not optional.

fields.name: shootSound
fields.notes: Sound emitted when a single bullet is shot.

fields.name: shootSoundVolume
fields.notes: Volume of shooting sound.

fields.name: chargeSound
fields.notes: Sound emitted when shoot.firstShotDelay is >0 and shooting begins.

fields.name: loopSound
fields.notes: The sound that this block makes while active. One sound loop. Do not overuse.

fields.name: loopSoundVolume
fields.notes: Active sound base volume.

fields.name: soundPitchMin
fields.notes: Range for pitch of shoot sound.

fields.name: soundPitchMax
fields.notes: Range for pitch of shoot sound.

fields.name: ammoEjectBack
fields.notes: Backwards Y offset of ammo eject effect.

fields.name: shootWarmupSpeed
fields.notes: Lerp speed of turret warmup.

fields.name: linearWarmup
fields.notes: If true, turret warmup is linear instead of a curve.

fields.name: recoil
fields.notes: Visual amount by which the turret recoils back per shot.

fields.name: recoils
fields.notes: Number of additional counters for recoil.

fields.name: recoilTime
fields.notes: ticks taken for turret to return to starting position in ticks. uses reload time by default

fields.name: recoilPow
fields.notes: power curve applied to visual recoil

fields.name: cooldownTime
fields.notes: ticks to cool down the heat region

fields.name: elevation
fields.notes: Visual elevation of turret shadow, -1 to use defaults.

fields.name: shake
fields.notes: How much the screen shakes per shot.

fields.name: drawer
fields.notes: Defines drawing behavior for this turret.
